{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Pattern Construction
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pattern Construction]] is a process used for summoning a goddess.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pattern Construction]] is a technique or ritual used by the [[Tanakites]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
